name: Moneytree
description_short: Moneytree is a California-licensed lender offering payday loans up to $255, check cashing services, and prepaid cards at physical locations.
description_long:
Moneytree operates physical branch locations across California, including the Chula Vista location at 1111 Broadway. The company is licensed by the California Department of Financial Protection and Innovation under the CA Deferred Deposit Transaction Law to make consumer loans. With a 4.6-star rating, the Chula Vista branch maintains extended hours (8 AM–8 PM weekdays, 9 AM–7 PM Saturday, 10 AM–4 PM Sunday), making it accessible for working consumers.

Moneytree's primary services include payday loans up to $255 (subject to qualification), check cashing for multiple check types, prepaid cards, wire transfers, and business check cashing. Payday loans are marketed as short-term, single-payment solutions with funds available in cash, via ACH transfer, or through Instant Funding to qualified debit cards within approximately 30–45 minutes. The company processes most checks on-the-spot with no bank holds, accepting payroll, government, personal, insurance, settlement, cashier's, and tax refunds at tiered fee rates (1.99%–6.99% depending on check type, plus $1.99 on transactions over $20).

Moneytree differentiates itself through convenient in-person service, extended branch hours, multiple funding delivery options (cash, ACH, debit card), and no bank holds on check cashing. The Chula Vista location provides phone-based support (619-426-6669) and in-person consultations. The company explicitly does not serve active-duty military members (covered borrowers under the Military Lending Act) and requires borrowers to maintain current, good-standing accounts.

Moneytree's payday loans carry a 460.16% APR on a $100, 14-day loan ($17.65 per $100 borrowed), placing this firmly in the high-cost small-dollar lending category. The website includes a customer notice warning that small-dollar loans used long-term become expensive. This service model is best suited for genuine short-term cash gaps, not ongoing debt management.
pros: 4.6-star rating with extended hours (8 AM–8 PM weekdays, 9 AM–7 PM Saturday)
Check cashing with no bank holds—most checks processed on-the-spot
Multiple check types accepted: payroll, government, personal, insurance, settlement, tax refunds, money orders
Fast payday loan funding options: cash, ACH, or Instant Funding to debit card (~30–45 minutes)
Tiered check cashing fees (1.99%–6.99%) with lower rates for payroll, government, and tax checks
Licensed by California Department of Financial Protection and Innovation
In-person branch service with phone support available
cons: Payday loans carry 460.16% APR—extremely high cost for short-term borrowing
Payday loan maximum of only $255 limits utility for larger emergencies
Check cashing fees on personal checks reach 6.99% plus $1.99 per transaction over $20
Company does not serve active-duty military members (Military Lending Act restriction)
Website warning acknowledges small-dollar loans used long-term become expensive
best_for: Consumers with urgent check cashing needs who want immediate access without bank holds
Workers needing small payday loans ($100–$255) for genuine short-term gaps before next paycheck
Unbanked or underbanked individuals seeking in-person financial services in Chula Vista
Business owners needing to cash business checks quickly
diagnosis: Moneytree is best for consumers needing check cashing without bank holds or small payday loans for genuine short-term gaps. The critical caveat is that payday loans at 460.16% APR should only be used as a true emergency bridge; the company's own disclosure warns that using small-dollar loans repeatedly becomes prohibitively expensive.
services: Payday loans up to $255 with approval
Check cashing (personal, payroll, government, insurance, settlement, cashier's, tax refunds)
ACH transfers for payday loan funding
Instant Funding to qualified debit cards (30–45 minute processing)
Bill payment services (implied via 'How We Can Help')
